title: Testing Guide
description: Complete guide to running tests and writing test cases in DemiEngine

sections.title: Testing Overview
sections.content: DemiEngine features a comprehensive test suite with **100% test coverage** across 155 tests. The testing system includes unit tests, integration tests, and in-assembly tests with powerful assertion capabilities.

sections.title: Quick Test Commands
sections.content:
```bash
# Run all tests
./bin/demi-engine -t
make test

# Run unit tests only (fastest)
./bin/demi-engine -ut

# Run integration tests
./bin/demi-engine -it

# Run assembly tests
./bin/demi-engine -at

# Filter by result
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=fails
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=success
```

sections.title: Test Types
sections.content:
**Unit Tests (78 tests, ~1-2s):**
- Assembler functionality
- Parser validation
- CPU instruction validation
- Error handling
- Negative test cases

**Integration Tests (42 tests, ~2-3s):**
- Complete hex programs
- CPU instruction execution
- Device I/O operations
- End-to-end workflows

**Assembly Tests (68 tests, ~1s):**
- In-assembly test validation
- Test structure parsing
- Assertion evaluation
- Test metadata handling

sections.title: Test Output Filtering
sections.content:
Control which tests are displayed while still running all tests:

```bash
# Show all tests (default)
./bin/demi-engine -at

# Show only failed tests
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=fails

# Show only passed tests
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=success
```

**Enhanced Summary:**
All modes show complete statistics including:
- Total tests run (passed/failed)
- Total assertions (passed/failed)
- Total execution time
- Breakdown by category

sections.title: Writing In-Assembly Tests
sections.content:
Tests are written directly in assembly files using special directives:

```asm
#test my_test_name
    #description Brief description of what is tested
    #author Your Name
    #category Test Category
    #tag tag1, tag2, tag3
    
    ; Test code here
    LOAD_IMM R0, 5
    LOAD_IMM R1, 3
    ADD R0, R1
    
    ; Assertions
    #assert_eq R0, 8
    #assert_ne R1, 0
#endtest
```

sections.title: Available Assertions
sections.content:
**Register Assertions:**
```asm
#assert_eq R0, 42      ; Assert R0 equals 42
#assert_ne R0, 0       ; Assert R0 not equal to 0
#assert_lt R0, 100     ; Assert R0 less than 100
#assert_gt R0, 10      ; Assert R0 greater than 10
#assert_le R0, 50      ; Assert R0 less or equal 50
#assert_ge R0, 20      ; Assert R0 greater or equal 20
```

**Memory Assertions:**
```asm
#assert_mem 100, 0x42  ; Assert memory[100] == 0x42
```

**Flag Assertions:**
```asm
#assert_flag zero      ; Assert zero flag is set
#assert_flag carry     ; Assert carry flag is set
#assert_flag overflow  ; Assert overflow flag is set
```

**Error Testing:**
```asm
#expect_error          ; Test should trigger an error
```

sections.title: Test Metadata
sections.content:
Metadata helps organize and document tests:

**Required:**
- Test name (in `#test` declaration)

**Recommended:**
- `#description` - What the test validates
- `#category` - Grouping for test reports

**Optional:**
- `#author` - Who wrote the test
- `#tag` - Keywords for searching/filtering

sections.title: Example: Arithmetic Test
sections.content:
```asm
#test addition_overflow
    #description Tests addition with overflow detection
    #author DemiEngine Team
    #category Arithmetic
    #tag overflow, flags, edge-case
    
    ; Add two large numbers to cause overflow
    LOAD_IMM R0, 255
    LOAD_IMM R1, 1
    ADD R0, R1
    
    ; Should wrap to 0 and set overflow flag
    #assert_eq R0, 0
    #assert_flag overflow
#endtest
```

sections.title: Example: Error Testing
sections.content:
```asm
#test division_by_zero
    #description Tests that division by zero triggers error
    #author DemiEngine Team
    #category Error Handling
    #tag error, division, validation
    
    #expect_error
    
    LOAD_IMM R0, 10
    LOAD_IMM R1, 0
    DIV R0, R1      ; Should trigger error
#endtest
```

sections.title: Test File Organization
sections.content:
Organize tests by category in separate files:

```
tests/asm/
├── test_arithmetic.asm       # Basic math operations
├── test_memory.asm           # Load/store operations
├── test_control_flow.asm     # Jumps and branches
├── test_stack.asm            # Push/pop operations
├── test_logical.asm          # Bitwise operations
├── test_error_cases.asm      # Error handling
└── test_comprehensive.asm    # Complex scenarios
```

sections.title: Development Workflow
sections.content:
**Quick Iteration:**
```bash
# 1. Make code change
vim src/engine/cpu.cpp

# 2. Quick test (1-2 seconds)
./bin/demi-engine -ut
```

**Testing CPU Changes:**
```bash
# Test instruction execution
./bin/demi-engine -it
```

**Before Commit:**
```bash
# Full test suite
make test
```

sections.title: Understanding Test Output
sections.content:
**Successful Test:**
```
[INFO] Test: addition_test
[INFO]   Description: Tests basic addition
[INFO]   Category: Arithmetic
[INFO] ✓ Test completed successfully
```

**Failed Test:**
```
[ERROR] Test: subtraction_test
[ERROR]   Description: Tests subtraction
[ERROR] ✗ Test failed
[ERROR]   assert_eq at line 25: Expected R0 = 5, but got R0 = 7
```

**Summary:**
```
=== Test Summary ===
Total Tests: 155 (passed: 155, failed: 0)
Total Assertions: 211 (passed: 211, failed: 0)
Total Execution Time: 42.15ms

By Category:
  Arithmetic: 22/22 passed
  Control Flow: 20/20 passed
  Memory: 16/16 passed
  ...

✓ All tests passed!
```

sections.title: Testing Best Practices
sections.content:
1. **Test one thing** - Each test should verify a single behavior
2. **Use descriptive names** - `test_addition_overflow` not `test1`
3. **Add descriptions** - Explain what and why you're testing
4. **Test edge cases** - Zero, max values, negative numbers
5. **Test error conditions** - Use `#expect_error` for invalid operations
6. **Organize by category** - Group related tests together
7. **Keep tests fast** - Avoid unnecessary operations
8. **Run tests frequently** - Catch issues early
9. **Document assumptions** - Comment any special setup
10. **Verify all assertions** - Don't assume earlier checks guarantee later ones

sections.title: CI/CD Integration
sections.content:
DemiEngine tests integrate easily with CI/CD pipelines:

```yaml
# GitHub Actions example
- name: Build DemiEngine
  run: make

- name: Run Tests
  run: make test

# Or run test types in parallel
- name: Unit Tests
  run: ./bin/demi-engine -ut
  
- name: Integration Tests
  run: ./bin/demi-engine -it
  
- name: Assembly Tests
  run: ./bin/demi-engine -at
```
